## Validation Checklist

Before submitting, please verify:

### Structure & Naming
- [ ] Folder name uses kebab-case
- [ ] Folder name matches skill name in frontmatter
- [ ] SKILL.md exists with exact casing (all caps)
- [ ] Subfolders organized properly (scripts/, references/, assets/)

### Frontmatter
- [ ] Valid YAML syntax (---delimited)
- [ ] `name` field present and matches folder name
- [ ] `description` field present with WHAT + WHEN + trigger phrases
- [ ] No XML angle brackets (`<`, `>`) in frontmatter
- [ ] No "claude" or "anthropic" in skill name
- [ ] Optional fields properly formatted (if used)

### Description Quality
- [ ] Describes WHAT the skill does
- [ ] Describes WHEN to use it
- [ ] Includes trigger phrases in quotes
- [ ] Includes both Turkish and English trigger phrases
- [ ] Trigger phrases are natural and realistic

### Instructions
- [ ] Clear and actionable instructions provided
- [ ] Organized with proper headings and structure
- [ ] At least one concrete example included
- [ ] Best practices or tips included (if applicable)
- [ ] Troubleshooting section (if applicable)

### Turkish/Kallavi Guidelines
- [ ] Turkish trigger phrases included
- [ ] Culturally appropriate for Turkish users
- [ ] Uses Turkish terminology where relevant
- [ ] Aligns with Kallavi persona (confident, versatile, culturally Turkish)

### Testing
- [ ] Tested with expected trigger phrases
- [ ] Tested with variations and edge cases
- [ ] Tested on at least one platform (Claude.ai, Claude Code, or API)
- [ ] Verified no conflicts with existing skills
- [ ] Progressive disclosure works correctly

### Security & Quality
- [ ] No credentials, API keys, or secrets included
- [ ] No sensitive or proprietary information
- [ ] Files properly organized by type
- [ ] No unnecessary large files in main skill body
- [ ] References and assets are in appropriate subfolders
